title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Delhi

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Delhi
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
